heading: AWS (Amazon Web Services) Kinesis Data Stream
body:
Atlas Stream Processing supports creating Private Link connections to AWS Kinesis
streams. To learn more, see [Add a Kinesis Private Link Connection](atlas-sp-pl-kinesis-add).

To operate on data from an AWS (Amazon Web Services) Kinesis data stream, the `$source` stage
has the following prototype form:

```json
{
  "$source": {
    "connectionName": "<registered-connection>",
    "stream": "<stream-name>",
    "region": "<aws-region>",
    "timeField": {
      $toDate | $dateFromString: <expression>
    },
    "tsFieldName": "<field-name>",
    "shardIdleTimeout": {
      "size": <duration-number>,
      "unit": "<duration-unit>"
    },
    "config": {
      "consumerARN": "<aws-arn>",
      "initialPosition": <initial-position>,
      reshardDetectionIntervalSecs: <interval>
    }
  }
}
```

The `$source` stage takes a document with the following fields:

| Field                        | Type     | Necessity   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ---------------------------- | -------- | ----------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| connectionName               | string   | Required    | Label that identifies the connection in the Connection Registry, from which to ingest data.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| config.consumerARN           | string   | Required    | ARN corresponding to a Kinesis consumer. Your consumer must use Enhanced fan-out.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| stream                       | string   | Required    | AWS (Amazon Web Services) Kinesis data stream from which to stream messages.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| region                       | string   | Conditional | AWS (Amazon Web Services) region in which the specified stream exists. Kinesis supports multiple data streams with the same name in different regions. If you use the same name for data streams in two or more regions within the same connection, you must use this field to specify which combination of name and region to use.                                                                                          |
| timeField                    | document | Optional    | Document that defines an authoritative timestamp for incoming messages.If you use timeField, you must define it as one of the following:a $toDate expression that takes a source message field as an argumenta $dateFromString expression that takes a source message field as an argument.If you do not declare a timeField, Atlas Stream Processing creates a timestamp from the message timestamp provided by the source. |
| shardIdleTimeout             | document | Optional    | Document specifying the amount of time that a shard is allowed to idle before it is ignored in watermark calculations.This field is disabled by default. To handle shards that don't move forwar due to idleness, set a value for this field.                                                                                                                                                                                |
| shardIdleTimeout.size        | document | Optional    | Number specifying the duration of the shard idle timeout.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| shardIdleTimeout.unit        | document | Optional    | Unit of time for the duration of the shard idle timeout.The value of unit can be one of the following:"ms" (millisecond)"second""minute""hour""day"                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| config                       | document | Optional    | Document containing fields that override various default values.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| config.initialPosition       | string   | Optional    | Position in the Kinesis data stream's history from which to begin ingesting messages. Must be one of either:"TRIM\_HORIZON": Begin ingesting from the oldest message in the shard."LATEST": Begin ingesting from the newest message in the shard.Defaults to "LATEST".                                                                                                                                                       |
| reshardDetectionIntervalSecs | integer  | Optional    | Interval, in seconds, between checks against the rate of data flow through your Kinesis stream for the purposes of resharding.Defaults to 300 seconds.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
